arabic_text:
أَبدأ
موجود
واحد
تام
کامل
باقی
عاقل
عالم
قادر
حی
english_text:
Originator
Existent
One
Complete
Perfect
Permanent
Intelligent
Knower
Powerful
Living
alt_text: A vertical stack of ten Arabic divine attributes with an upward green arrow on the right, illustrating the hierarchical ascent of God's attributes — from حی (Living, highlighted at base) through Powerful, Knower, Intelligent, Permanent, Perfect, Complete, One, Existent, up to أَبدأ (Originator/I Begin, highlighted at apex).
notes: The base attribute حی (Living) is highlighted yellow; the apex attribute أَبدأ (Originator) is highlighted pink. The diagram illustrates the foundational-to-transcendent ordering of divine attributes from which the First Intellect emanates — context of section 'کمال اول' (First Perfection) in the chapter on the Formation of the Spiritual World.
